title: bundle.caseFraming (SSOT v1)
description: Single-source-of-truth case framing object stamped by the EMR bundle producer onto bundle.caseFraming and consumed READ-ONLY by every drafter/EMR framing+SC consumer. ABSENCE/unknown-version = fail-open to each consumer's legacy derivation, byte-identical. See docs/SSOT_CASEFRAMING_BUILD_PLAN_2026-06-10.md. LOCKED: framing:'aggravation' is the data-level pathway label ONLY; the 3.306-vs-3.310(b) regulatory mechanism choice is framingGate's, downstream. The SSOT never encodes a CFR citation.

version.description: Contract version. v1 = 1. A consumer that does not recognize the version MUST treat the whole object as absent (fail-open to legacy). Independent of bundle BUNDLE_SCHEMA_VERSION.

framing.description: Data-level pathway label (NOT a CFR reg citation). 'undetermined' = producer could not decide; consumers treat it like absence for THEORY decisions but may still read grantedScAnchors.

grantedScAnchors.description: 0..N granted service-connected primaries. STRICT filter: only entries whose source status lowercased === 'service_connected'. Denied/pending/claimed/deferred excluded by the producer. Deduped by normalized condition, self-anchor excluded, ordered by descending ratingPct then condition asc. Empty array is valid and meaningful (no granted anchor).

status.description: Always literally 'service_connected' — the strict-filter guarantee. A non-strict producer fails the contract test here.

upstreamScCondition.description: RN-named upstream primary verbatim, else null. Mirrors EMR Case.upstreamScCondition.

framingChoice.description: RN hand-set pathway value verbatim, else null. Mirrors EMR Case.framingChoice. When non-null, drives source='rn_set' (top of precedence) and must NEVER be clobbered by the producer.

claimType.description: PATHWAY (not THEORY) — the procedural posture of the VA claim. Mirrors the EMR producer's Case.claimType, which is REQUIRED/non-null and whose Prisma enum is EXACTLY {initial, supplemental, hlr, appeal_bva} (compact-emr-work backend/prisma/schema.prisma). The enum is pinned tight to the sole producer's domain so a producer that emits anything else (e.g. a drafter-legacy framing string like 'secondary'/'direct'/'presumptive') FAILS the contract test rather than silently validating. Framing/THEORY ('secondary'/'aggravation'/'direct') is carried by the separate `framing` field — never by claimType. NOTE: the consumer-side default `c.claimType || 'secondary'` at dxVerificationGate.js:77 is LEGACY consumer behavior on the drafter bundle's own case object; it does NOT describe the producer (EMR claimType is non-nullable, so the producer never defaults).

source.description: Provenance of the `framing` value per the precedence ladder. rn_set > derived > text_parse_fallback > default_direct.

derivedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the EMR producer computed this object.
